Container.Name: nvidia-smi-exporter
Container.Overview: Prometheus exporter for NVIDIA GPU metrics via nvidia-smi. Compatible with all architectures on driver 595+. Metrics will be available here: "http://UNRAID_IP_HERE:9202/metrics". Requires Nvidia-Driver plugin to be installed.
Container.Changes:
###2026-07-01 - Internal refactor: deduped nvidia-smi command execution and XML parsing logic (no user-facing change)
###2026-05-20 - Added README.md for consistent display across Unraid Plugins tab, Tools menu, and Community Apps store - Expanded changelog entries in plugin manifest
###2026-05-19 - Grafana dashboard added with comprehensive GPU metrics visualization
###2026-05-18 - Fixed Plugins tab status display and changelog popup that were broken by previous name change - Plugin internal identifier reverted to filename slug for Unraid compatibility
###2026-05-17 - Renamed plugin display name to "Nvidia-SMI Exporter" across all user-facing surfaces - Added Grafana dashboard covering all exported metrics - Moved plugin settings page from Settings tab to Tools menu (User Utilities) - Fixed plugin icon installation and display
###2026-05-16 - Initial public release with driver 595+ support - Renamed LISTEN_ADDRESS environment variable to EXPORTER_PORT - Added GPU detection logging at startup - Added custom plugin icon - Updated base Docker image to CUDA 13.2.1 - Switched Docker image publishing from GHCR to Docker Hub - Updated GitHub Actions to Node.js 24 compatible versions
